flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Montana Technological University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($22.6k → $26.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Montana Technological University rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.4k → $8.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Montana Technological University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Montana Technological University are 22% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($54.3k vs $44.5k).
